languages.text: {n}Перед вашим взглядом раскинулось стрельбище. Под надзором крупного мужчины, чья нога заменена на конструкцию из дерева и кости, несколько меровцев стреляют по мишеням.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, вознеси меня Бог-Император! Удостоили визитом. Младший сержант-инструктор Данкош, Ваша Светлость, готов вам помочь!"

{n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
languages.original_text: {n}Перед вашим взглядом раскинулось стрельбище. Под надзором крупного мужчины, чья нога заменена на конструкцию из дерева и кости, несколько меровцев стреляют по мишеням.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, вознеси меня Бог-Император! Удостоили визитом. Младший сержант-инструктор Данкош, Ваша Светлость, готов вам помочь!"

You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
{n}Numerous sparring rings, shooting ranges, and obstacle courses are spread out before you. Even now, when the settlement is besieged by the Drover, some of the soldiers find the time to train.{/n}

{n}The shooting range is spread out before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am ready to assist!"

You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

languages.text: {n}数多くの練習場、射撃場、障害物コースが目の前に広がっている。現在、ドルーバーに包囲されているこの町でも、兵士の中には訓練に時間を割く者もいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numerous sparring rings, shooting ranges, and obstacle courses are spread out before you. Even now, when the settlement is besieged by the Drover, some of the soldiers find the time to train.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Atış poligonu önünde uzanıyor. Bacağı ahşap ve kemikten yapılmış devasa bir adamın gözetimindeki birkaç Merovlu, hedeflere ateş ediyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Tanrı İmparator beni korusun! Ziyaretinizle bizi onurlandırdınız. Ben Talim Çavuşu Dankosh. Size yardımcı olmaya hazırım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!"
languages.original_text: {n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Atış poligonu önünde uzanıyor. Bacağı ahşap ve kemikten yapılmış devasa bir adamın gözetimindeki birkaç Merovlu, hedeflere ateş ediyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Tanrı İmparator beni korusun! Ziyaretinizle bizi onurlandırdınız. Ben Talim Çavuşu Dankosh. Size yardımcı olmaya hazırım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!"

languages.text: {n}射击场在你面前延展开来。一名体格魁梧的男人在旁监督，他的一条腿由木头和骨头拼接而成，几个梅罗夫人正瞄准靶子射击。{/n}“大人，神皇保佑！您大驾光临，真是我们的荣幸。初级操练军士丹科什，随时听候您的差遣！”
languages.original_text: {n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}射击场在你面前延展开来。一名体格魁梧的男人在旁监督，他的一条腿由木头和骨头拼接而成，几个梅罗夫人正瞄准靶子射击。{/n}“大人，神皇保佑！您大驾光临，真是我们的荣幸。初级操练军士丹科什，随时听候您的差遣！”

languages.text: {n}Vor dir liegt der Schießstand. Unter der Aufsicht eines korpulenten Mannes, dessen Bein durch ein Konstrukt aus Holz und Knochen ersetzt wurde, feuern einige Merovianer auf Ziele.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Gottimperator steh mir bei! Euer Besuch ist für uns eine große Ehre. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, stets zu Diensten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"
languages.original_text: {n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vor dir liegt der Schießstand. Unter der Aufsicht eines korpulenten Mannes, dessen Bein durch ein Konstrukt aus Holz und Knochen ersetzt wurde, feuern einige Merovianer auf Ziele."{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Gottimperator steh mir bei! Euer Besuch ist für uns eine große Ehre. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, stets zu Diensten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"

languages.text: {n}Le stand de tir s'étend devant vous. Sous la supervision d'un homme imposant dont une jambe a été remplacée par un assemblage de bois et d'os, quelques Meroviens s'entraînent à tirer sur des cibles.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, l'Empereur-Dieu me préserve ! C'est un honneur de recevoir votre visite. Sergent-instructeur subalterne Dankosh, prêt à vous assister ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le stand de tir s'étend devant vous. Sous la supervision d'un homme imposant dont une jambe a été remplacée par un assemblage de bois et d'os, quelques Meroviens s'entraînent à tirer sur des cibles.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, l'Empereur-Dieu me préserve ! C'est un honneur de recevoir votre visite. Sergent-instructeur subalterne Dankosh, prêt à vous assister ! »

languages.text: {n}El campo de tiro se extiende ante ti. Bajo la supervisión de un hombre gigantesco cuya pierna está sustituida por una construcción de madera y hueso, algunos merovianos disparan a las dianas.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, que el Dios Emperador me guarde! Nos honra con su visita. ¡Soy el sargento de instrucción novato Dankosh, listo para asistir, mi{mf|lord|lady}!».
languages.original_text: {n}The shooting range extends before you. You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
